<!-- What needs to be done? Be specific — this issue is the single source of truth now. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] <!-- What does "done" look like? -->
- [ ] <!-- Second criterion if applicable -->

## Urgency

- [ ] 🔴 **Blocking** — Someone is stuck until this is resolved
- [ ] 🟡 **Timely** — Should be done this sprint / within a few days
- [ ] 🟢 **Backlog** — Important but not urgent
